info.title: Just Tap Super Admin API
info.description:
REST API for the **Just Tap Super Admin** mobile application.

## Authentication
1. Call `POST /auth/login` with email/phone and password.
2. Copy the `token` from the response.
3. Add header on all protected routes: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
4. Refresh expired tokens via `POST /auth/token/refresh`.

**Default seed login:** `admin@justtap.com` / `admin123`

## Clients (Create Event)
- `GET /clients?forSelect=true` — load **Client Name** dropdown
- `POST /clients` — quick-add client from **+** modal (`{ "name": "testy" }`)
- `GET /clients/{id}` — get client details

## Function Names (Create Event)
- `GET /function-names?forSelect=true` — load **Select Function** dropdown
- `POST /function-names` — quick-add function from **+** button (`{ "name": "Reception" }`)
- `GET /function-names/{id}` — get function name details

## Manager API docs
Manager portal has a separate Swagger UI: `/api/manager/docs`

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Event CRUD, calendar, functions, nested operations

tags.name: Menu
tags.description: Menu categories, items, packages, and catalog management

tags.name: Menu Planning
tags.description: Add Item flow — create categories, subcategories, and menu items

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Task templates and event task assignment

tags.name: Managers
tags.description: Event manager allocation — create managers and list for team assignment dropdowns (captain uses the same manager records)

tags.name: Team Allocation
tags.description: Team allocation boards and manager report (assigned tables, tasks, timeline)

tags.name: Clients
tags.description: Client master data — list dropdown & quick-add for Create Event (GET /clients, POST /clients)

tags.name: Function Names
tags.description: Function name master data — list dropdown & quick-add for Create Event Function Details step (GET /function-names, POST /function-names)

tags.name: Feedback Questionnaire
tags.description: Dynamic feedback questions for admin and guest apps

tags.name: Report Builder
tags.description: Menu report designer — templates, theme, typography, and client sharing

get.description: Returns 200 if the Node.js process is running. Use for Kubernetes liveness probes.
Checks MySQL and Redis connectivity. Returns 503 until all dependencies are ready.

503.description: Not ready — database or Redis unavailable

post.description: Authenticate with identifier (email/phone) and password. Returns JWT access and refresh tokens.

200.description: Login successful — use `accessToken` in Authorization header
Reset link/token sent if account exists

avatar.description: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF (max 5 MB)

get.description: Aggregated stats: today events, pending inquiries, task summary, recent activity.

post.summary: Import inquiries from CSV or JSON

get.description: Returns paginated categories for the **Menu Item Category** dropdown on the Add Item screen.

post.description: Creates a category from the **Menu Item Category** bottom sheet (name, slogan, photo).

get.description: Returns subcategories for the **Menu Item Sub Category** dropdown. Filter by `categoryId` when a category is selected.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Filter subcategories by parent category (numeric ID or UUID)

post.description: Creates a subcategory from the **Menu Sub Item Category** bottom sheet.

get.description: List menu items. Supports `categoryId` and `subcategoryId` filters.

post.description: Creates a menu item from the **Add new item** screen. Upload photo first via `POST /uploads/images`.

get.description: Returns global features and package tiers with included feature IDs for the Manage Packages screen.

patch.description: Bulk update feature toggles and package tiers (Save System Changes button).

get.description: Returns event tasks with the manager each task is assigned to (`assignedTo`, `assigneeName`). Supports filtering by event, manager, status, or unassigned tasks.

schema.description: Search task title, description, or manager name

get.description: Returns active event managers (`staff` with role `event_manager`). Captain is the same role — use this endpoint for both captain and manager dropdowns on create event step 4. Use `forSelect=true` for an unpaginated list sorted by name (multi-select dropdowns). Supports pagination and search by name.

parameters.name: forSelect
parameters.description: Return all matching managers as `{ items }` without pagination

post.description: Creates a new event manager (`staff` with role `event_manager`) from the **Allocate New Member** modal or captain quick-add. Send `memberName` and `designation`.

Creates a manager portal user account linked to an existing event manager staff record.
Super admin sets the login email (username) and password here.
The manager then signs in via `POST /api/manager/auth/login` using the same email as `identifier` and the password set here.

get.description:
**Create Event — Client Name dropdown**

Call with `forSelect=true` to load all clients sorted by name (recommended for the dropdown).
Optional `search` filters by client name, caterer name, or contact number.

**Example:** `GET /clients?forSelect=true&search=testy`

parameters.name: forSelect
parameters.description: Set to `true` for dropdown list (`{ items: Client[] }`, no pagination)

post.description:
**Create Event — Add Client (+) modal**

Adds a new client to the database. Only `name` is required when using the quick-add modal.
Other fields (`catererName`, `cityName`, `contactNo`, `reference`) are optional and can be filled on the event form later.

Use the returned `id` as `clientId` when creating the event.

get.description: Returns a single client record by numeric ID or UUID.

**Create Event — Select Function dropdown**

Call with `forSelect=true` to load all active function names sorted by `sortOrder` then name (recommended for the dropdown).
Optional `search` filters by name.

**Example:** `GET /function-names?forSelect=true`

parameters.name: forSelect
parameters.description: Set to `true` for dropdown list (`{ items: FunctionName[] }`, no pagination)

post.description:
**Create Event — Add Function (+) button**

Adds a new function name to the database. Only `name` is required.
Use the returned `name` when adding a function to an event.

post.summary: Import staff from CSV or JSON

get.description: List admin-managed dynamic feedback questions. Filter by eventId for event-specific questions, or scope=global for global questions.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: Filter by event ID or UUID

get.description: Public endpoint for guest/consumer app. Returns active global + event-specific questions ordered by sortOrder.

get.summary: Get active feedback questions for event (public)

get.description: Returns event managers on the team allocation board for the given team type, including assignment pill labels per member.

Returns the **Manager Report** screen payload for a manager staff member: profile, efficiency score, stats, **assignedTables** (table numbers assigned to this manager via the "Select tables to assign" screen), done/pending tasks, and activity timeline. Task metrics are filtered by team type.

200.description: Manager report with assigned table list

get.description: Returns all assigned operational tasks for this manager on the given team board, with **summary** counts (total, completed, pending). Use on the admin manager view screen to review task progress.

200.description: Assigned tasks with completed/pending summary for manager

post.summary: Assign tasks to manager from allocation board

200.description: Tasks assigned; returns updated assigned task list for this manager

get.description: Fetch design templates from the database. Filter by category: all, luxury, minimal, classic, custom.

post.description: Create a menu report for an event, or return the existing report if one already exists (one report per event).
Upload bride/groom or decorative photo. Stores URL via existing upload service (no Base64).

delete.description: Soft-deletes a report photo. Clears `brideGroomPhotoUrl` when the deleted photo was set as the bride/groom image.

post.description: Generates a print-ready A4 PDF from the report using HTML + CSS + Puppeteer. Loads report data, images, theme, typography, grid, menu sections, and Handlebars template, then stores the PDF URL.

get.description: Download the generated PDF file. Pass `urlOnly=true` to receive JSON with `pdfUrl` instead.

parameters.name: urlOnly
parameters.description: Return JSON `{ pdfUrl }` instead of file download

200.description: PDF file stream (when urlOnly is false)

bearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained from `POST /auth/login` or `POST /auth/otp/verify`. Send as: `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>`

ClientSelectList.description: Client list for Create Event dropdown. Returned by `GET /clients?forSelect=true` (no pagination).

ManagerTabletMedia.description: Create Event step 2 — Tablet / Photography / Videography

ManagerBrideGroomInformation.description: Create Event step 2 — Bride and Groom Information

CreateManagerEventRequest.description: Manager mobile app create-event wizard (4 steps)

clientId.description: Existing client from GET /clients. When omitted, clientName, clientAddress, clientMobile, and reference are required.

UpdateManagerAllTasksRequest.description: Partial update for the manager All Tasks screen

JustTapInformation.description: Create Event step 4 — Just Tap Information (replaces former Menu Package tab)

assignedManagerIds.description: Manager staff IDs from GET /managers (forSelect=true). Captain is the same role — use manager endpoints only.

clientId.description: Existing client ID from GET /clients. When omitted, clientName, catererName, clientMobile, and reference are required to create a new client.

name.description: Display name in Create Event client dropdown

FunctionNameSelectList.description: Function name list for Create Event dropdown. Returned by `GET /function-names?forSelect=true`.

memberName.description: Display name for the new manager

email.description: Optional portal login email (registers manager when password is also sent)

RegisterManagerRequest.description: Set manager portal login credentials. Use `email` (or `username` as alias) plus `password`. Manager logs in at POST /api/manager/auth/login with identifier=email.

CreateClientRequest.description: Quick-add from Create Event uses name only; other fields can be filled later on the event form.

CreateMenuCategoryRequest.description: Menu Item Category form — provide `name_english` or `name`. Upload photo first via POST /uploads/images.

slogan.description: Hindi name or tagline (Slogan field in UI)

CreateMenuSubCategoryRequest.description: Menu Sub Item Category form — name only, linked to a parent category.

CreateMenuItemRequest.description: Add new item form — select category and subcategory from dropdowns or create them inline first.

slogan.description: Hindi name or tagline (Slogan field in UI)

userId.description: Linked portal user ID when registered

isRegistered.description: True when manager has portal login credentials

assignments.description: Assignment pill labels shown on the allocation board

assignedTables.description: Assigned table pill labels on the Manager Report screen (table numbers assigned to this manager)

isAssigned.description: Always true in this list — only assigned operational tasks are returned

isCompleted.description: True when the manager has marked this task completed

summary.description: Assigned task progress for admin manager view

total.description: Total assigned tasks on this team board

eventId.description: Omit or null for global questions

showToClient.description: When true, billing is visible in the client app

filled.description: True when cost data has been saved at least once

staffId.description: Manager staff assigned to this table

isAssigned.description: True when a manager or user code is set (read-only)

staffId.description: Event manager to assign to the selected table

allocationType.description: Use `dining` for Table View, `captain` for Captain View

assignedManagerIds.description: Event manager staff IDs from GET /managers?forSelect=true. First ID becomes the primary assigned manager.

BadRequest.description: Bad request — malformed input or unsupported file type

Unauthorized.description: Missing or invalid JWT — include `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header
